title: Job Control Management in Hadoop MapReduce
description:
The 'lib/jobcontrol' directory in Hadoop MapReduce architecture houses the 'ControlledJob.java' and 'JobControl.java' files, which together form a sophisticated job control management system. The 'ControlledJob.java' class encapsulates a MapReduce job and its dependencies, managing the job lifecycle and states. It interacts with the Hadoop framework for job submission and updates its state based on dependent jobs' progress. 

The 'JobControl.java' class oversees a collection of 'ControlledJob' objects, tracking their states, and managing their submission and monitoring. It uses a topological sorting algorithm to detect circular dependencies. Both classes collaborate to ensure efficient and controlled execution of MapReduce jobs, thereby enhancing the overall robustness and reliability of the Hadoop MapReduce architecture. The system employs standard Java collections and logging utilities, along with Hadoop-specific classes, to achieve its functionality.
